fields.name: spawn rate multiplier#the higher this number, the sooner the model is fully spawned in

source scan position#the direction in model space that the scan starts from.
Ignored if do not sort vertex order flag is set above
scale factor#model scale to match camera space
camera orbit period#0 means camera is stationary
particle scale#scale factor for individual particles
particle acceleration#This is the acceleration rate when particles spawn in and move to their ultimate destination.  Higher numbers move faster.

particle initial offset multiplier#If flag particles spawn radially is set, this is the multiple of the particle location along the radial axis.
If not, this the random spawn distance from the particle destination.
Generated data
fields.definition: the following are generated from running the tool generate-loadscreen command on this tag.

options: particles spawn radially#see particle initial offset multiplier
